Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_NPC_DONE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Don't worry, we'll keep them safe at the entrance until you decide to leave for the night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_NPC_DONE2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}If you find any more missing people, please rescue them as quickly as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_CAT_DONE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Don't worry, we'll keep the kitty safe at the entrance until you decide to leave for the night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}So you can keep exploring, if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NPC_NOT_EXIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}I tried searching again, but I don't sense any more people inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I think we rescued everyone that had wandered in here. Thank goodness...[n]{f 1 1}
